message:
fix(fp-io,fp-conformance): fix 3 bugs found in code review

1. arb_safe_string() could generate "true"/"false" which CSV parser
   interprets as Bool, breaking Utf8 column round-trip. Fixed regex
   to include mandatory underscore: "[a-z]{2}_[a-z0-9]{0,7}".

2. read_excel_bytes() silently ignored the index_col option due to
   copy-paste omission. Refactored both read_excel and read_excel_bytes
   to share a common parse_excel_rows() helper that handles all options.

3. Float index labels in Excel reader were unconditionally truncated
   to Int64 via `v as i64`, losing precision for non-whole-number
   floats. Now only converts to Int64 for whole numbers; non-integer
   floats become Utf8 string labels.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
